name: CapCut Pro Access
description: Unlock premium video editing features including 4K export, advanced AI effects, unlimited templates, background remover, and 1TB cloud storage. Perfect for TikTok, YouTube, and Reels creators.

name: AI Resume Builder Pro
description: Create ATS-optimized resumes in minutes with AI. Choose from 100+ modern templates, get smart suggestions, keyword optimization, and export to PDF/Word. Ideal for job seekers.

name: Canva Pro Lifetime
description: Unlimited access to premium templates, 1TB storage, Brand Kit, Magic Studio AI tools, and millions of stock photos/videos. One-time payment for lifetime access.

name: Runway AI Video Generator
description: Advanced AI video generation and editing tool. Turn text or images into stunning videos with Gen-3/Gen-4 models, motion brush, lip sync, and high-quality upscaling.

name: Microsoft Office 365
description: Full access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, OneDrive and more. Includes 1TB cloud storage per user and real-time collaboration features.

name: Adobe Photoshop
description: Industry-standard photo editing and graphic design software. Includes AI-powered tools like Generative Fill, Neural Filters, and advanced layer support.

name: Adobe XD
description: Professional UI/UX design and prototyping tool. Create wireframes, interactive prototypes, and design systems with ease.

name: WinRAR
description: Powerful archive manager and file compression tool. Supports RAR, ZIP, 7Z and many other formats with strong encryption.
